project.name: OutreachAI
project.description: AI-powered lead generation and outreach automation platform for agency owners

milestones.name: Foundation & MVP
milestones.description: Core SaaS functionality with auth, payments, and working lead scraping

milestones.name: AI Features
milestones.description: Real AI email generation and website audit features

milestones.name: CRM & Sequences
milestones.description: Lead management, follow-up sequences, and campaign tracking

tasks.title: Bootstrap design system tokens and constants
tasks.description: Create the token file with all CSS variables for spacing, color, typography, shadow, radius, and motion. Create the copy constants structure. This must be complete before any UI component is built.
acceptance_criteria: tokens.css (or equivalent) exists with all spacing, color, type, shadow, radius variables
All variables follow the naming conventions in design-system.md
copy/ directory exists with errors.ts, labels.ts, empty-states.ts, notifications.ts stubs
Design system rules file is reviewed and any project-specific overrides documented

tasks.title: Build shared pattern components
tasks.description: Build the four pattern components that every feature will use: EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState/Skeleton, ConfirmDialog, Toast/Notification. These must exist before any feature UI is built.

states_required.empty: N/A — these ARE the state components

acceptance_criteria: EmptyState: accepts title, description, optional CTA, optional icon
ErrorState: accepts title, description, onRetry, optional errorCode
LoadingState: accepts shape prop for skeleton matching
ConfirmDialog: accepts title, description, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, onConfirm, variant
Toast: accepts message, variant (success|error|warning|info), duration, optional action
All components fully accessible
All components use design system tokens exclusively
All components documented with purpose, variants, props, usage

tasks.title: Set up development environment and database
tasks.description: Create Docker Compose for local Postgres, initialize Drizzle schema, set up .env.example, and configure development scripts.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL service
.env.example with all required variables documented
Drizzle schema files created for users, subscriptions, usage_quotas, saved_leads
Migration scripts ready to run
bun run db:setup and bun run db:migrate work locally

tasks.title: Implement user authentication (better-auth)
tasks.description: Set up better-auth with email/password login, session management, and middleware to protect routes.
acceptance_criteria: better-auth configured with email/password (and optional OAuth)
Signup and login pages working
Session middleware protects /api routes and /leads page
User data stored in database
Logout functionality working

tasks.title: Integrate Stripe for subscriptions
tasks.description: Set up Stripe Checkout, webhook handler, and subscription management with plan tiers.
acceptance_criteria: Stripe Checkout integration for plan upgrades
Webhook handler for subscription events
User plan status stored in database
Billing portal access for plan changes
Test mode working with Stripe CLI

tasks.title: Implement usage quotas and rate limiting
tasks.description: Create middleware to enforce plan limits on API calls and track usage per billing period.
acceptance_criteria: Usage quota table tracks leads scraped and emails generated
Middleware checks quota before allowing API calls
Quota resets on billing period renewal
API returns 403 when quota exceeded
Usage stats displayed to user

tasks.title: Refactor lead scraping API with auth and quotas
tasks.description: Update existing /api/leads route to require authentication, check quotas, and save leads to database.
acceptance_criteria: API requires authenticated user
Quota check before scraping (deduct from user limit)
Leads saved to database with user_id
Error handling for quota exceeded
Response includes usage remaining

tasks.title: Build authenticated lead finder interface
tasks.description: Create new lead finder page with auth gating, usage display, and lead saving functionality.

states_required.empty: No searches performed yet - shows search form with usage stats
states_required.loading: Scraping in progress - skeleton table matching loaded structure
states_required.error: API error or quota exceeded - error state with retry/upgrade options

acceptance_criteria: Page requires authentication
Current usage and plan limits displayed
Search form with location/industry/filters
Results table with save/export functionality
Saved leads persist to database
Responsive design (mobile/tablet/desktop)
All states implemented (empty, loading, error, success)

tasks.title: Integrate OpenAI for email generation
tasks.description: Create AI service to generate personalized cold emails based on lead data and user preferences.
acceptance_criteria: OpenAI integration working with API key
Email generation endpoint accepts lead data and tone
Generated emails are personalized and professional
Error handling for API failures
Usage tracking for AI calls

tasks.title: Build AI email generator interface
tasks.description: Create email generation modal/interface with tone selection, preview, and copy functionality.

states_required.empty: Lead selected but no email generated yet

acceptance_criteria: Integrates with saved leads from leads-ui-01
Tone selection (direct, casual, bold)
Email preview with formatting
Copy to clipboard functionality
Regenerate option
Usage deduction on generation

tasks.title: Build user dashboard
tasks.description: Create dashboard showing usage stats, saved leads, recent activity, and plan management.

states_required.empty: New user - welcome state with getting started prompts
states_required.error: Failed to load dashboard - retry option

acceptance_criteria: Usage statistics (leads scraped, emails generated, quota remaining)
Recent saved leads with quick actions
Plan status and upgrade options
Activity timeline
Navigation to other features

tasks.title: Set up testing framework and write initial tests
tasks.description: Configure Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E tests, and write test coverage for core functionality.
acceptance_criteria: Vitest configuration working
Unit tests for API routes
Unit tests for utility functions
E2E tests for critical user journeys
CI pipeline running tests
Minimum 80% code coverage on core features
